BeneficiaryParty.Name: Innovative AIX
BeneficiaryParty.Address: Suite 180, 1st Floor, Nemea Building, 6 Isocrates Street, 2360 Strovolos, Cyprus

Transaction.SuspiciousActivity: Pattern of transfers to offshore entity with inconsistent communication and blocked withdrawal attempt.
Transaction.Notes: Multiple transactions totaling significant amounts raised concerns. The recipient entity appears to have limited transparency.
